title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 80.240 - Trustees — power of appointment
text:
80.240.  Trustees — power of appointment. — Such board of trustees shall have power to appoint an assessor, collector, marshal, treasurer, and such other officers, servants and agents as may be necessary, remove them from office, prescribe their duties and fix their compensation.
(RSMo 1939 § 7251, A. 1949 H.B. 2030, A.L. 1953 p. 268) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7100; 1919 § 8549; 1909 § 9437
